data.title: Automotive Bearing Market to reach $12.82 billion by 2032, with EV market rising from $5.81 billion in 2025 at a CAGR of 11.97%.

Similarly, the global automotive bearing market for Internal Combustion Engine (ICE) vehicles is anticipated to expand from USD 31.02 billion in 2025 to...

data.title: Three wealthy bidders are competing for remnants of Hudson’s Bay as legal battles follow retailer's 355-year closure.
data.description: Legal proceedings stemming from the closure of the historic 355-year-old Hudson’s Bay Company continue to progress several months after the company ceased operations.

data.title: Billionaire Bill Ackman questions Fed Governor Lisa Cook over mortgage fraud allegations. Integrity of financial system at stake.
data.description: Billionaire investor Bill Ackman has entered into the dispute between President Donald Trump and Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook, urging Cook to directly address allegations of mortgage fraud. Ackman highlighted the importance of upholding integrity in the American financial system. He referenced past Fed Governors who resigned over minor infractions and called for Cook to clarify the accusations against her. Ackman emphasized the need for transparency and urged Cook to easily disprove the fraud claims. William Pulte, Director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, provided evidence suggesting Cook's involvement in mortgage fraud. Ackman stressed the necessity for Cook to address the allegations promptly to maintain the credibility of her position.

data.title: AAVE predicted at $370-$400 by Sep 2025 if $340 breakout; analyses show mixed signals.
data.description: The latest AAVE price forecast suggests potential price targets of $370 to $400 if the resistance level at $340 is surpassed. Technical analysis reveals conflicting indicators, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum.

data.title: 14 people, including ex-BJP legislator & 11 police officials, sentenced to life for abducting a Surat businessman in a bid to seize 750+ Bitcoin.
data.description: A past member of the BJP and 11 law enforcement officers have been found guilty for their involvement in the kidnapping of a Surat businessman in 2018. The plan was to illegally take possession of more than 750 Bitcoin.

data.title: Quick Fix Synthetic issues warning about counterfeit products, advises checking batch numbers for authenticity. Las Vegas, Aug. 30, 2025.
data.description: Quick Fix Synthetic has issued a consumer alert in Las Vegas on August 30, 2025, regarding counterfeit Quick Fix products. Customers are advised to verify batch numbers to ensure authenticity. As the official distributor of Spectrum Labs' Quick Fix, the company stresses the importance of checking batch numbers for peace of mind and to prevent purchasing fraudulent products. It is crucial for consumers to remain vigilant and ensure the legitimacy of the Quick Fix products they purchase to avoid any potential risks.

data.title: Janet Yellen warns Trump's firing of Fed's Lisa Cook may lead to 'catastrophic' consequences: higher inflation, volatile growth, weakened currencies. Fed governors serve 14-year terms to maintain independence.
data.description: Janet Yellen, the former head of the Federal Reserve, has issued a strong warning regarding President Donald Trump's recent move to dismiss Fed Governor Lisa Cook. Yellen expressed concerns in an op-ed for the Financial Times, highlighting the potential threats this action poses to the independence and credibility of the Federal Reserve. She emphasized that politically influenced central banks could lead to increased inflation, unstable economic growth, and devaluation of currencies, which could ultimately harm the United States. Yellen cautioned that jeopardizing the Fed's autonomy could have dire consequences for the country's economic stability and global standing. She stressed the importance of upholding the 14-year terms for Federal Reserve governors to maintain its integrity and prevent...

data.title: Acceleware extends private placement financing closing to September 5, 2025, per TSX Venture Exchange.
data.description: Acceleware Ltd., a leading innovator of RF power-to-heat technologies focusing on process heat, amine regeneration, and enhanced oil production, has obtained an extension from the TSX Venture Exchange to finalize additional tranches of its non-brokered Private Placement of Units. This extension shifts the closing date from September 1, 2025, to September 5, 2025. The Private Placement was initially disclosed in press releases on June 30, 2025, and August 12, 2025. Acceleware's trading symbol on the TSX Venture Exchange is AXE.

data.title: Bybit & Santiment's DeFi report showcases platform token success, with Mantle (MNT) seeing over $1M in whale transactions.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on August 30, 2025, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange, Bybit, launched a DeFi report in partnership with Santiment, a crypto market intelligence platform. The report delves into the world of platform tokens, highlighting Mantle (MNT) among others. Bybit’s collaboration with Santiment sheds light on the DeFi landscape, offering valuable insights to the cryptocurrency community.

data.title: PEPE price aims at $0.0000112 in 7 days due to technical improvements, with a potential 5% increase.
data.description: Analysts predict that the price of PEPE may increase by 5% to reach a resistance level of $0.0000112 in one week. This forecast is based on the recovery of the oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) and consensus targets set by analysts.

data.title: Nvidia CEO predicts AI may lead to 4-day work weeks, yet warns of increased workload. Quarterly earnings hit $46.74B.
data.description: Nvidia Corp. CEO Jensen Huang predicts that artificial intelligence may lead to a transition to four-day work weeks in the future. However, despite this, workers are expected to be even more occupied than before due to AI accelerating business processes and idea generation. Following Nvidia's impressive $46.74 billion quarterly earnings, Huang emphasized that the world is only beginning to experience the AI revolution, which could bring about significant changes to traditional work schedules. Despite the increased efficiency in completing tasks quickly, workers are likely to face a productivity paradox where they have more ideas but less time to execute them. For more details, visit the organization's website.

data.title: Elon Musk's lawyer to chair $200M Dogecoin treasury firm, bringing meme-crypto mainstream. Miami-based House of Doge involved.
data.description: Alex Spiro, the longtime lawyer of Elon Musk, is reportedly going to head a Dogecoin treasury company with a backing of $200 million from the House of Doge. The initiative aims to integrate the meme-inspired cryptocurrency into mainstream finance. The plan involves establishing a publicly traded company focused on holding and investing in Dogecoin. This move has been approved by the House of Doge, the official entity overseeing Dogecoin's development. The Miami-based group, initiated by the Dogecoin Foundation in early 2025, seeks to formalize the growth of the popular cryptocurrency. The news comes from a pitch circulating among investors, with six sources confirming the details. The development is seen as a significant step towards legitimizing Dogecoin in the financial sector.

data.title: Missouri company overwhelmed by demand for "Fall of Rome" candle, already planning new social media success.
data.description: A Missouri-based small business is facing challenges meeting the high demand for its "Fall of Rome" candle, as it works on creating another social media sensation.

data.title: North West Company Inc. will report Q2 results on Sep 8, 2025, with a conference call on Sep 9, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Central Time. Conference call dial-in: 416-340-2217 or 1-800-898-3989, passcode 4960688#. Archived call available until Oct 9, 2025, dial 905-694-9451 or 1-800-408-3053, passcode 1624688#.
data.description: Winnipeg-based North West Company Inc. (TSX Symbol: NWC) is set to announce its second-quarter results on September 8, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call discussing these results will be held on September 9, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. (CT). Investors can join the call by dialing 416-340-2217 or 1-800-898-3989 with the passcode 4960688#. For those unable to participate, a recorded version of the call will be available until October 9, 2025, accessible by dialing 905-694-9451 or 1-800-408-3053 with the passcode 1624688#.

data.title: Garden Plastics Market projected to reach $1.13 billion by 2030 - MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: A recent report on the Garden Plastics Market, released on August 30, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, highlights the segmentation of the market by plastic type. It includes Commodity Plastics such as HDPE, LDPE, PP, and PVC, as well as Engineering Plastics and Performance Plastics like ABS, PA, PVDF, POM, and TPE. The report also delves into various applications of garden plastics, including Pots & Containers, Irrigation Systems, and Greenhouse & Tunnel setups. This comprehensive analysis aims to provide insights into the growing market trends and preferences within the industry.

data.description: The anticipated price movement for ARB indicates a period of consolidation within the range of $0.43 to $0.48. Analysts suggest that in the medium term, there is a potential for a breakout above the resistance level of $0.50 within the next 2-4 weeks.

data.title: Hardship withdrawals from 401(k) plans rise to 4.8% in 2024 (up from 3.6% in 2023), as financial expert warns against it.
data.description: In 2024, hardship withdrawals from 401(k) plans rose to 4.8% of participants, showing an increase from 3.6% in 2023, as indicated by data from Vanguard Group Inc. This uptick highlights the growing financial strain on American workers in need of immediate cash access. Early access to 401(k) funds can incur tax penalties, urging individuals to consider it as a last resort option, advised Paul Brahim, a certified financial planner and president of the Financial Planning Association, as reported by CNBC. Withdrawals made before the age of 59½ from a traditional 401(k) are subject to income tax in addition to a 10% penalty, unless certain hardship exemptions apply. The impact of compound interest on such withdrawals... Find the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cytokinetics releases primary findings from MAPLE-HCM study at ESC Congress 2025, published in The New England Journal Of Medicine.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that there are over 500 new cases of COVID-19 in the local community. This brings the total number of confirmed cases to more than 10,000 since the beginning of the pandemic. Additionally, there have been 15 new deaths reported, bringing the total number of fatalities to 250. These numbers highlight the continued impact of the virus on the population and emphasize the importance of following health guidelines to curb its spread.
